\tzpentry{ID3560}{Wavefunction Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3560 introduces Wavefunction Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \psi_1(r,\theta,t) \;\propto\; r^\ell e^{i(\ell\theta + \beta\,\Phi_{\rm EEG}(t,\mathbf r))} e^{-r^2/(2\sigma_r(t)^2)} \]
